generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax and type errors without altering the underlying AADL architecture.
Prioritize fixing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations when AGREE reports type errors.
Ensure AGREE contracts are contained within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `int`, `real`, and `bool` for AGREE scalar type declarations.
Ensure helper declarations match the expected expression types (e.g., comparison expressions are `bool`).
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new AADL architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on correcting contract syntax or removing invalid clauses.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
